insert.foreach: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL013 */ INTO ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT ( BB_PRODUCT_CODE, BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, BB_BRANCH_CODE, BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BB_QUANTITY, QUANTITY_SAIRYOU, CHOSE_REASON, SR_CREATE_DATE, SR_UPDATE_USER_ID ) (SELECT #{param.brandCode}, #{param.bbPresentationFrom}, #{param.butenCode}, #{param.accountNumber}, TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbQuantityForSairyou}), TO_NUMBER(#{param.quantitySairyou}), #{param.choseReason}, CORDYS.IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{param.userId} FROM DUAL )
